title: Run partition and fault-injection tests
description: Use a fault injector to partition, delay, and crash nodes while a consistency checker validates the cluster's promised invariants.
body: Steps: 1. Define the invariant under test (linearizability, no lost acked write, single leader). 2. Drive a concurrent client workload while recording a real-time history of operations. 3. Inject nemeses: network partitions, asymmetric drops, clock skew, and process crashes. 4. Heal faults and let the cluster recover. 5. Run a linearizability/consistency checker over the recorded history. Rollback point: before running against a shared/staging cluster. Validation: the checker reports no invariant violation across many randomized runs; a clean run on a healthy cluster without injected faults does not count as evidence. Escalate any acked-write loss immediately.
